herbs.herb_desc: Allium sativum, commonly known as garlic, is a versatile herb that has been used for centuries in various cuisines around the world. When a clove of Allium sativium is chopped, its pungent flavor and aroma are released, adding depth and complexity to a wide range of dishes. Chopped garlic is a fundamental ingredient in many recipes, from savory sauces and marinades to soups and stir-fries.
